name: Bontoys by Benran public R&D facts
description: Bontoys by Benran is the international brand of Benran Zhiqu (本然智趣). It is developing voice modules and scenario-based dialogue systems for existing toys. Public materials document a physical R&D prototype, a basic voice loop, and a scenario-dialogue method without claiming mass production or customer deployment.

about.name: Bontoys by Benran
about.disambiguatingDescription: The international R&D-stage brand of Benran Zhiqu, not affiliated with the historic Italian Bontoys/Bontempi businesses, Bon Ton Toys, or B. toys.
